name: Zexal Alliance
name_jp: ゼアル・アライアンス
desc: If a face-up Xyz Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: Pay LP so that you only have 10 left; Special Summon 1 "Utopia" monster from your GY, and if you do, take 1 card from your Deck and place it on top of your Deck. That Special Summoned monster's ATK becomes doubled, also it cannot be destroyed by battle, except by battle with a "Number" monster, nor by card effects.
eff: If a face-up Xyz Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: Pay LP so that you only have 10 left; Special Summon 1 "Utopia" monster from your GY, and if you do, take 1 card from your Deck and place it on top of your Deck. That Special Summoned monster's ATK becomes doubled, also it cannot be destroyed by battle, except by battle with a "Number" monster, nor by card effects.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Places cards from the player's Deck on the top of the Deck
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
